questions.question: Describe the primary function of a Clock Signal Generator in a synchronization hardware system. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A synchronization hardware system relies on clock signals to coordinate the actions of various components.

questions.question: Explain the difference between a Phase-Locked Loop (PLL) and a Voltage-Controlled Oscillator (VCO) in synchronization hardware. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Compare and contrast the characteristics of PLLs and VCOs in the context of synchronization hardware.

questions.question: A synchronization hardware system consists of a Crystal Oscillator, a Phase Detector, and a Loop Filter. What is the primary function of the Phase Detector? (5 marks)
questions.hint: The Phase Detector determines the phase difference between the input and reference signals in a synchronization hardware system.
